tolerance.notes: ULP-level tolerance per docs/GRIDS_API.md §4.2. The rule's coefficient AST contains only +, *, /, unary -, and a single cos(lat) supplied by the binding (which delegates to libm). Linux/macOS libm cos is bit-stable across our supported platforms, so all bindings hit the same Float64 result as Julia (the reference).

reference_binding_notes: The first cross-binding rule-eval golden lands alongside the TypeScript evaluator (dsc-e1g). Python (dsc-ve1) and Rust (dsc-k86) siblings consume the same fixture + golden and must agree to the tolerance above. When the Julia latlon binding lands (dsc-1ts), Julia takes over as the reference per GRIDS_API §4.3 and the golden is regenerated from Julia.
